summary: Comprehensive testing of the Safety & Trust layer for DoorGuard. All 24 backend pytest cases passed (100%). All frontend Safety & Trust UI flows passed including SOS FAB/dialog/confirm, Safety Center tabs (contacts/report/alerts/tips), trainer trust badges, trust panel, and full end-to-end session check-in/check-out with toast confirmation. Regression flows (login, dashboard, trainer search, trainer profile, booking dialog) also pass.

issues: A11y warning: DialogContent missing Description / aria-describedby. Non-blocking but should add DialogDescription for screen-reader users.

action_items: Optional: add <DialogDescription> to booking dialog and SOS dialog to silence Radix a11y warning.
Optional: surface check-in/check-out timestamps in the session card (currently only a 'Completed safely' badge shows after checkout).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 940 lines - consider splitting into modules (auth, sessions, safety, payments) for maintainability.

/api/sessions/{id}/checkout sets safety_checked_out but does NOT set session status to 'completed'. The endpoint message says 'Session marked complete.' which is misleading. Consider also setting status='completed' or update the message.
/api/safety/alerts/{id}/resolve returns 404 (not 403) when the alert belongs to another user. Returning 404 is acceptable (avoids leaking existence) but be aware FE may need to differentiate.
GET /api/safety/emergency-contacts has no role guard - trainers calling it get an empty list silently. Minor; consider returning 403 for consistency with PUT.
Pydantic EmailStr blocks .test/.example TLDs. Document this for future tests; we used @test.com successfully.
test_credentials: Seeded client: client_sft_1781136145@test.com / Test1234! (now has additional emergency contacts, alerts, reports, and one confirmed+checked-out session 'Personal Training with UI Test Trainer' from this test run). Fresh trainer/client accounts were registered with @test.com domain via /api/auth/register.
seed_data_creation: Created during this iteration: (1) several TEST_ prefixed client/trainer accounts via /api/auth/register, (2) extra emergency contacts on the seeded client, (3) ~3 SOS alerts (1 resolved), (4) 1 incident report under_review, (5) 1 confirmed session for the seeded client (id facb1f4c-...) that is now safety_checked_in + safety_checked_out.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file is /app/backend/tests/test_safety_trust.py - run with: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://trainer-marketplace-11.preview.emergentagent.com pytest backend/tests/test_safety_trust.py -v. The seeded client client_sft_1781136145@test.com now has multiple emergency contacts and alert history; tests are idempotent and overwrite the contacts list. The Sessions page 'Upcoming' tab includes confirmed sessions; checkin/checkout buttons only appear for status='confirmed' sessions, so to UI-test you must first book a session AND have the trainer PUT /api/sessions/{id}/status?status=confirmed.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All Safety & Trust features (emergency contacts CRUD with role guard, SOS create/list/resolve with notified_count, incident reports, session check-in/check-out with owner-only 403, trainer trust signals background_check_status='cleared' & id_verified=true, SOS FAB on all client pages, Safety Center tabs, trust panel, bg-check trainer card badges) work as specified.
